summary: Completed backend testing of AI API cost protection features. All 10 tests passed. Features verified: input size validation (400 for >10k chars), admin-only usage endpoint (403 for non-admin, 200 for admin), governance-suggestions caching (cache hit ~17ms vs AI call ~3-5s), and MongoDB tracking collections (ai_usage_tracking, ai_suggestion_cache).

minor.issue: The provided admin JWT was generated with a different JWT_SECRET than what's in backend/.env. Had to regenerate token with correct secret.

test_credentials.admin_user: jeff@socialize.video (use JWT generated with correct JWT_SECRET from backend/.env)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI cost protection features fully implemented and tested. Key collections: ai_usage_tracking (tracks daily usage per user per endpoint with cost estimates), ai_suggestion_cache (caches governance-suggestions for 1hr per user+trust). Admin endpoint /api/ai/usage restricted to jeff@socialize.video. Input validation rejects >10k chars with 400. Note: The admin JWT provided in the original request was invalid - it was signed with a different JWT_SECRET. Generate new admin tokens using the JWT_SECRET from backend/.env.

input_size_validation_400.details: POST /api/ai/minutes-draft returns 400 when total input exceeds 10,000 characters with clear error message

input_size_valid_works.details: POST /api/ai/minutes-draft works with valid input under 10,000 characters, returns draft_body

admin_endpoint_403_non_admin.details: GET /api/ai/usage returns 403 'Access denied. Admin only.' for non-admin users

admin_endpoint_200_admin.details: GET /api/ai/usage returns 200 with budget, current_month, last_month, rate_limits, cost_per_call_cents for admin

governance_suggestions_caching.details: Second call to governance-suggestions returns cached result (~17ms vs ~3-5s for AI call)

ai_usage_tracking_mongodb.details: ai_usage_tracking collection correctly stores user_id, endpoint, date, count, estimated_cost_cents

ai_suggestion_cache_mongodb.details: ai_suggestion_cache collection correctly stores user_id, trust_id, cached_at, response

input_size_distributed_fields.details: Input validation correctly counts all fields combined (minutes_type, participants, decisions_outline, etc.)

ai_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/ai/status returns ai_enabled, features, rate_limits, daily_caps

mongodb_verification.ai_usage_tracking: 2 records found - governance-suggestions (1 req, 0.2 cents), minutes-draft (8 req, 24.0 cents)
mongodb_verification.ai_suggestion_cache: 1 cached entry found for demo user
